subcodes.first_line: O friends! How blessed, how favoured, how fortunate are ye to have been born in such a cycle… You had asked about the number of days of Ridvan.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران چه خوش بخت و بلند اختر و همایون طالع بودید که در چنین کور و دوری
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @importance of community building, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @alcohol and drugs; tobacco; opium
